appliedUpdates.description: Added TYPE_CHECKING import for HyperNetwork and changed recovery_network type annotation from nn.Module to HyperNetwork to fix mypy errors
Split long line in @pytest.mark.skip decorator to comply with 100 char limit

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that recovery networks should have their own optimizers or have their parameters explicitly included in the main optimizer. The current pattern of only computing recovery loss without training the recovery network itself is a common pitfall.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: training-synaptic-trainer review identified that the recovery network does not receive gradient updates because its parameters are not in the optimizer.

rejectedObservations.observation: CodebookVQ compression test has 22% reconstruction error (>10% threshold)
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a pre-existing issue unrelated to the training milestone. The scrutiny validator should only address issues introduced in this milestone's features.
